specific_question: Following the costly technical failure of Lee's Market's knowledge database system on September 13, 2024, what measures did the KM team implement to prevent similar issues in the future?
answer: After the costly collapse of the knowledge database system on September 13, 2024, the KM team revised operating guidelines to schedule updates only during non-working hours and directed the IT department to develop an emergency plan for quickly deploying the backup system until the issues are resolved.
dr_question: Given the rise of AI-based knowledge management systems, what strategies can Lee's Market's knowledge management team implement to help maintain low employee turnover rates through 2027?
